item.title: AI Research Brief: 2026-05-25
item.description: Weekly issue covering high-signal AI research and engineering work published or updated between May 18 and May 25, 2026, with emphasis on AI-for-research milestones, agent infrastructure, agent evaluation, post-training, long-context efficiency, and coding-agent behavior.

item.title: AI Research Brief: 2026-05-22
item.description: Weekly issue covering high-signal AI-for-science agents, web and research agents, RLVR training, agent safety, retrieval, and recommender-system work published or updated between May 15 and May 22, 2026.

item.title: AI Research Brief: 2026-05-20
item.description: Weekly issue covering strong agent infrastructure, long-context efficiency, retrieval, recommender, alignment, and safety work published or updated between May 13 and May 20, 2026.

item.title: AI Research Brief: 2026-05-18
item.description: Weekly issue covering strong agent, memory, retrieval, safety, recommender, and model-efficiency work published or updated between May 11 and May 18, 2026.

item.title: AI Research Brief: 2026-05-16
item.description: First verified issue covering recent agent, multimodal, interaction, and privacy research and technical releases published or updated between May 6 and May 15, 2026.
